name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Combine margarine, graham cracker crumbs, and sugar; press firmly on the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
6. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 5 minutes or until set.
8. Cool thoroughly before serving. Chill thoroughly. Garnish as desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
